creator: tomasv@megalogika.lt
text:
On Wed, Nov 07, 2007 at 02:56:24AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/tomcat55,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/117883 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/117883

I totally aggree with the patch, but it seems to be a bit late:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=116307
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=696313+0+/usr/local/www/db/text/2007/cvs-ports/20070923.cvs-ports

So, the PR can be freely closed.
-- 
Tomas "Verbaitis" Verbaitis ** http://megalogika.lt
